leadText: The Pretty Feather (Japanese: きれいなハネ Beautiful Feather), known as Pretty Wing prior to Pokémon Sword and Shield, is a valuable item introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Pretty Feather serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM Though this feather is beautiful, it's just a regular feather and has no effect on Pokémon. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V ZA Though this feather is beautiful, it's just a regular feather and has no effect.
